document.id: Upper Mattaponi Tribe Budget Res. No. 2026-01
document.heading: FY 2026 Budget Modification #1
document.text: A Budget Resolution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribal Council modifying the Annual Budget of the Tribe for Fiscal Year 2026; providing short title; describing purpose; making findings; adopting an amended budget; and providing an effective date.
At a duly called General Meeting of the Council held this 24th day of January 2026, the following Resolution and Law were adopted.

recital.text: The Upper Mattaponi Tribal Council (the "Council") is vested with the authority to enact Budget Resolutions for the purpose of passing an Annual Budget or Budget Modifications by Article VII, Section 4(c) of the Constitution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe; and
The Council now finds that, due to an unanticipated economic opportunity, it is both necessary and expedient to modify the Annual Budget for Fiscal Year 2026;

section.heading: Short Title.
section.text: This Budget Resolution shall be known and may be cited as "FY 2026 Budget Modification #1"

section.heading: Purpose.
section.text: The purpose of this Budget Resolution is to appropriate additional funds into the FY 2026 annual budget to provide funding for a new unanticipated economic project

section.heading: Findings.
section.text: The Council hereby finds and declares as follows:

para.text: The Council is vested with the power to enact Budget Resolutions for the purpose of passing an Annual Budget or Budget Modifications by Article VII, Section 4(c) of the Constitution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe.
The Council is vested with the power to raise revenues and appropriate funds for expenditure by Article VII, Section 4(c) of the Constitution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe.
It is now necessary and expedient to enact a Budget Modification to account for and appropriate funds for the new unanticipated economic project.

section.heading: Adoption and Approval.
section.text: This Council hereby adopts and approves the Budget Modification attached hereto.

section.heading: Effective Date.
section.text: The Budget Resolution shall be in force and of effect immediately from and after its passage and approval according to law.

procedural-data.text: The foregoing Budget Resolution was duly voted upon by the Council on the 24th day of January 2026, at a General Meeting with a vote of 7 in favor and 0 opposed, 0 abstaining, and 0 absence, pursuant to the authority vested in the Council by the Constitution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe.
